query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, IS_NULLABLE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'ordersome' AND TABLE_NAME = 'users' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AKK2AjLXvjySfzt.defe7b7a87b6 --database gjTAhmM88fiEhPinRVjKbV --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, COLUMN_DEFAULT, IS_NULLABLE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'ordersome' AND TABLE_NAME = 'users' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
